## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the project's style (inline styles, `c` token, no Tailwind)
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, or `.env` files included
- [ ] No compiled binaries committed (`alerthub_linux_amd64`, etc.)
- [ ] API changes are backward-compatible or flagged as breaking
- [ ] Database migrations are reversible
- [ ] CODEOWNERS-required reviewers have been added
